content_sections.heading: HPCL Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited (HPCL) Recruitment 2026 notification released for 54 posts of Junior Executive. Candidates with B.Sc, Diploma Can Apply Online. The Online application process for HPCL Recruitment 2026 has started on 01-07-2026 and will remain open until 20-07-2026. The candidate shall apply online through HPCL website, hindustanpetroleum.com/.

content_sections.heading: HPCL Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Download
content_sections.text: The HPCL Junior Executive Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF has been released on 01-07-2026 at hindustanpetroleum.com/. Check the complete job details, vacancy, age limit, application fee, selection process and how to apply from the article. You can Check all Latest Sarkari Result Updates of All Central Government Jobs and State Government Jobs. HPCL Junior Executive Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Name of the Post : HPCL Junior Executive Online Form 2026 Post Date : 01-07-2026 Total Vacancy : 54 Posts Brief Information: The Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited (HPCL) has announced a notification for the recruitment of Junior Executive Vacancy. Eligible Candidates who are interested in the vacancy details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the notification & Apply.

rows.hindustan_petroleum_corporation_limited_: Application Fee For UR, OBCNC, EWS Candidates: Rs. 1180/- (Rs. 1000/- + GST @18%) + payment gateway charges For SC, ST, PwBD Candidates: Exempted

Eligibility Criteria Junior Executive – Chemical : 3-year full-time Regular Diploma in Chemical Engineering Junior Executive – Fire & Safety : Any Science Graduate + Diploma in Fire & Safety with valid Heavy Vehicle Driving License
Salary Junior Executive – Chemical: Rs 30,000 – 1,20,000 Junior Executive – Fire & Safety: Rs 30,000 – 1,20,000
